results.rendered_html:
bhadrā
1 A cow.
2 N. of the second, seventh, and twelfth days of a lunar fortnight.
3 The celestial Ganges.
4 N. of various plants.
5 N. of Subhadrā, sister of Kṛṣṇa and Balarāma.
Comp.
— śrayaṃ sandal wood.
